name.en: Jal Jeevan Mission - Tamil Nadu Rural Water Supply
name.ta: ஜல் ஜீவன் மிஷன் - தமிழ்நாடு கிராமப்புற நீர் வழங்கல்

budget.notes: Central grant increased from ₹921.99cr (2020-21) to ₹3691.21cr (2021-22). Total assured ₹8428.17cr for 2021-22

timeline.completionNotes: 78.19% rural households now have tap water connections

sources.title: PIB - Central Grant to TN for JJM
PIB - 78.77% Rural Households with Tap Water

notes: Statewide rural water supply. Representative coordinate at Chennai
